prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Consul service mesh traffic starts timing out between sidecars. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/consul that (1) build or propagate upstream proxy configuration, (2) manage Connect sidecar or proxy timeouts, and (3) surface timeout failures during request forwarding or service resolution.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the hashicorp-consul fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Consul service mesh traffic starts timing out between sidecars. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/consul that (1) build or propagate upstream proxy configuration, (2) manage Connect sidecar or proxy timeouts, and (3) surface timeout failures during request forwarding or service resolution.

params.search_pattern: Connect OR proxy timeout OR service mesh OR upstream
